posts.cooked: Hi there,i downloaded WINHQR and I opened ANIM.HQR (LBA2) to hope seeing all the animation (2083 animations ! ) I have all of them,where can I find their name? I want Zoes one but I only see their number

- Blafards61: I have not yet implemented the descriptions in my program. However, Im making a new program, which will replace WinHQR. Its called LBA Explorer. And it will have compression, descriptions, etc. So I suggest you to wait until that or to use LBA Package Editor by Zink.

blafard, for now you cant edit lba2 in the way you want. things you can edit are now:
LBA1:
all maps, text + fonts, scene (actors and where they go, but not what they do), music, just about everything except for actor life scripts

LBA2:
rooms (not outside maps), actors (what they look like and where they move but again not what they do), music, text and fonts

in terms of switching around HQR entries, check the file information site. if it isnt listed there, you cant do it

""Golemboy"":

LBA2:
rooms (not inside maps), actors (what they look like and where they move but again not what they do), music, text

Think, what you write, man. Of course we can edit the INSIDE maps. Only the OUTSIDE maps we can ONLY BARELY edit. And dont forget the images and fonts in both games.

OK. Im going to tell you a story. Its about a double-dealer, called ChaosFish. He promised me by PM, that he will help me with the LBA 2 ANIM.HQR list, but he never did. And I think he never will. I need some help, guys. Its 2084 entries! How can I do it alone? The body list was hell enough It may also take a week, you know. I need some help for this.

Yes, I intended to start it but then I got busy with other things.

Sorry, but I dont have time for making this list in the near future. I didnt PM you about that because I thought Id do it eventually, but as it seems now Im not so sure.

1)It will be really long

2)When we do that,we dont know wich characters animation is.

You know what I mean

I just tried something that you shouldnt do.With the viewer,I saw that Zo has 14 anim and the Pingouins body was before her,so,I guest that her animation will start at #90.Butwellwhen Im standing,Im seeing Zoedoing strange thing,like throwing something,whats of the hell,is the animation of ZOE !!!

Edit2: I have one question.In LBA1,I replace Twinsen normal mode walking,by Zoe walking.But It changes my speed,Im slower now.So I had that question,If I replace Twisens body by the Dinofly one and I change the animation WALKING by the Dino-Fly animation FLYING,will I fly ?

- Blafards61:

  1. Its not throwing. Its turning. Its because the viewer does this: RUN ANIMATION -> RESET -> RUN ANIMATION, instead of RUN ANIMATION -> RUN ANIMATION.
  2. Explain yourself better, please.
  3. You will fly, but only ahead, and it will be uncontrollable. To control the flying, do this: replace all the Twinsen Walking animations with Twinsen with Proto-Pack animations. Its the only way.
